interface.shortDescription: Read-only Makestar admin query and resource tooling.
interface.longDescription: Makestar admin skills for read-only operational lookups through the makestar-admin CLI/binary: auth token acquisition, browser fallback token recovery, admin resource queries, event-to-SKU resolution, SKU inventory checks, and order detail inspection. Requires fresh Makestar admin bearer tokens and intentionally avoids write operations.
defaultPrompt: Resolve event code P_10463_PLAVE_1 to product contents, concrete SKU, and inventory.
Look up SKU021276 stock detail with the Makestar admin resource scripts.
Inspect order C260419002426520H1 using read-only Makestar admin tooling.
